title: Citrosma kunthii
taxonomy: Citrosma kunthii is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the same family. Citrosma kunthii is an herbaceous plant native to South America, and its classification as a Rubiaceae member reflects its close evolutionary ties with other plants in this family. The plant's classification is further supported by its leaf and flower morphology, which are similar to those of other Rubiaceae species. Within the Rubiaceae family, Citrosma kunthii is often classified in the tribe Spermacoceae, which consists of plants with similar characteristics.

intro: Citrosma kunthii, also known as Citrosma, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to South America. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce swelling, prevent infection, and protect against cell damage.
